improvements.areaName: SEO Meta Description and OG Tags
improvements.suggestion:
<meta name="description" content="Gideon is your Claude-powered AI assistant for trade and business. Get instant answers, voice chat, and professional support. Try three free searches, then unlock unlimited access from US$2/day.">
<meta property="og:title" content="GDN AI – Gideon | Your AI Trade & Business Assistant">
<meta property="og:description" content="Meet Gideon, a Claude-powered AI assistant built for business owners, traders, and professionals. Instant answers, voice chat, and unlimited workspace access. Start with three free searches.">
<meta property="og:type" content="website">
<meta property="og:image" content="https://yourdomain.com/og-image.jpg">
<meta property="og:url" content="https://yourdomain.com/">
<meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image">
improvements.rationale: A compelling meta description improves click-through rates from search results by clearly communicating the product value and free trial offer. Open Graph tags ensure professional, branded previews when the homepage is shared on LinkedIn, Twitter, or Facebook—critical for B2B audiences. Including the free trial and starting price adds urgency without overpromising.

improvements.suggestion:
Meet Gideon — Your AI Trade & Business Assistant

Get instant, expert answers for trade and operations. Try three searches free, then unlock unlimited access.
improvements.rationale: Immediately introduces the product name and purpose, clearly states the free trial offer (three searches) to reduce friction, and hints at the value of membership — all in two concise lines that drive action without overpromising.

improvements.suggestion:
Q: What happens after my three free searches?

A: Once you've used your three complimentary searches, you'll be invited to become a member. Membership starts at just US$2 per day, giving you unlimited access to Gideon's full capabilities—including voice chat, your personal workspace, and professional trade and business support. Choose monthly billing or save 30 percent with an annual plan.
improvements.rationale: This FAQ directly addresses the most common friction point: what happens when the free trial ends. It transparently explains the paywall, reinforces value, and presents pricing clearly—reducing abandonment and building trust at the critical conversion moment.
